name: hoc/description-list
description: A structured key-value list component for displaying metadata, properties, or read-only field sets in a compact two-column layout. Provides DescriptionList, DescriptionTerm, and DescriptionDetails primitives with consistent typography, border separators, and responsive stacking on narrow viewports. Ideal for detail panels, summary cards, and entity-property views.
useCases: User-profile detail panels showing Email, Role, Department, and Joined Date key-value pairs
Product specification sheets listing Dimensions, Weight, Material, and Warranty properties
Order-summary sidebars displaying Subtotal, Tax, Shipping, and Total line items
API-documentation parameter tables rendered as readable definition lists instead of HTML tables
